flashcards.definition: Key knee stabilizer preventing anterior tibial translation; common sports injury.
Four muscles (SITS: supraspinatus, infraspinatus, teres minor, subscapularis) stabilizing the shoulder.
Thickest and strongest tendon; connects calf muscles to the heel bone (calcaneus).
Mild traumatic brain injury from a blow to the head; requires careful management.
Chronic Traumatic Encephalopathy; degenerative brain disease from repeated head impacts.
